results.title: Senior ML Engineer at Intuit | DevShelfHub
highlights:
Senior ML Engineer at Intuit | DevShelfHub
...
Full time 🤖 AI / ML
...
# Senior ML Engineer at Intuit
...
6-16
...
## About the Role
...
At Intuit, we are building for TurboTax, QuickBooks, Credit Karma, and AI-driven financial automation for 100M+ consumers. You will lead development of AI capabilities — from LLM fine-tuning to real-time inference infrastructure that serves millions of users.
...
### What you'll do
...
- Lead ML system design for TurboTax, QuickBooks, Credit Karma, and AI-driven financial automation for 100M+ consumers AI features from feature engineering to real-time inference
- Lead LLM fine-tuning and RLHF experiments and deploy resulting models to production at scale
- Build distributed training infrastructure and model serving pipelines for low-latency inference
- Establish MLOps best practices including model versioning, CI/CD for ML, and automated retraining
- Define evaluation frameworks, offline benchmarks, and online A/B testing methodologies
- Mentor ML engineers and collaborate with researchers to bring cutting-edge work to production
...
### What we're looking for
...
- 5+ years of ML engineering with proven track record of shipping production ML systems
- Deep expertise in PyTorch with experience in LLM fine-tuning techniques (SFT, RLHF, DPO)
- Strong distributed training experience across multi-GPU or multi-node clusters
- Expert knowledge of MLOps tooling, feature stores, and model monitoring at scale
- Experience designing statistically rigorous A/B tests for model evaluation
- Excellent cross-functional collaboration skills between research, product, and engineering
...
## Skills & Technologies
...
Python PyTorch LLMs Java Spring Boot React AWS PostgreSQL
...
## About Intuit
...
Intuit Inc. is a global financial technology platform whose products — TurboTax, QuickBooks, Credit Karma, and Mailchimp — power the prosperity of 100M+ consumers and small businesses. Founded in 1983, Intuit employs 17,000+ people and leads with AI-driven financial tools.
...
### Job Details
...
Type Full time
...
Experience 5–9 years
...
Location Hyderabad, India
...
Salary ₹45L – ₹76L
...
Work Mode WFO
...
Category AI / ML
...

...

results.title: Jeremy
highlights:
Principal AI Engineer - AI Builder at Intuit | Jeremy
...
# Principal AI Engineer - AI Builder
...
Principal-level AI engineer building 0→1 AI-native products at Intuit's Foresight organization, responsible for developing and deploying large-scale LLM and reasoning systems that power financial technology experiences for 100M+ customers.
...
Python AWS Azure GCP Anthropic LLM Data Analysis Algorithms Data Structures A/B Testing MLOps AI Agents Model Evaluation Data Quality Cursor
...
Intuit is the global financial technology platform that powers prosperity for the people and communities we serve. With over 100 million customers worldwide using our flagship products - TurboTax, Credit Karma, QuickBooks, and Mailchimp, we believe that everyone should have the opportunity to prosper. Intuit’s strategy is to be a global AI-driven expert platform delivering world-class experiences for our customers at unprecedented speed and scale. With AI at the heart of the strategy, Intuit has created a new organization led by our Chief AI Officer to drive Intuit’s evolution as a global AI technology leader through a dedicated research and innovation focus and a partnership with leading academic and industry organizations. Intuit’s AI teams have access to rich data and production grade AI platforms, enabling our scientists and engineers to move quickly from research to impact.
...
We are seeking a self-motivated, hands-on Principal AI Engineer who operates with a high degree of autonomy and builds impactful products with high velocity to join Intuit’s Foresight organization. You will be responsible for leveraging the latest advances in AI to solve complex, high-impact technical problems that unlock entirely new AI-driven experiences through the new 0 → 1 AI native products that you will build. Your work will directly shape how millions of Intuit’s customers, both small businesses and individuals, prosper through the effective use of AI within our platforms and products. If you are a builder who loves to ship fast, learn continuously, and independently drive impact, then this is the right role for you.
...
- Shape and execute on a multi-year technical roadmap in partnership with Intuit’s AI leadership ensuring that Intuit stays on the leading edge of AI innovation through incubation and development of emerging new technologies and capabilities.
...
- Build end-to-end solutions that demonstrate how the latest advances in AI can drive transformative new experiences for our customers.
...
- Collaborate closely with business units and platform teams to accelerate testing and deployment of new technologies and capabilities into Intuit’s products and platforms.
...
- Ensure excellence in data quality, model evaluation, and lifecycle management through rigorous monitoring, testing, and retraining practices.
...
- BS / MS / Ph.D. in Computer Science, Statistics,
...
Mathematics, Physics, Operations Research or related discipline.
...
- Deep technical AI expertise especially in areas like training LLMs, reasoning models, multi-modal models and their application to Forecasting and Planning, Decision Making Under Uncertainty, Multi-objective Optimization, Learning from Human Feedback, Data Cognition, and Deep Personalization to build production-grade scalable AI agents and systems.
...
- 8+ years of experience or significant demonstrated impact developing and deploying AI solutions at scale that successfully solve challenging customer problems.
...
- AI Tools Fluency: Hands-on experience using AI coding tools (e.g., Claude Code, Cursor, Codex) to augment and accelerate your daily development workflows.
...
- Experience building large-scale Machine Learning applications on cloud platforms like AWS, GCP, or Azure is a strong plus.
...
- Strong Computer Science / Data Science fundamentals including data structures, algorithms, performance complexity, data analysis, model training, A/B testing, and MLOps practices.

results.title: Senior Credit Risk AI Scientist - Fintech Consumer Risk | Wfh
highlights:
Senior Credit Risk AI Scientist - Fintech Consumer Risk | Wfh
...
# Senior Credit Risk AI Scientist - Fintech Consumer Risk
...
Intuit is seeking a highly skilled and experienced Senior Credit Risk AI Scientist to join our Fintech Consumer Risk team. In this role, you will be responsible for developing and implementing cutting-edge AI models and strategies to manage credit risk for our growing consumer base. As a leader in the industry, we are looking for a dynamic individual who is passionate about leveraging advanced analytics and technology to drive business impact. If you are a self-starter with a strong background in credit risk and AI, we invite you to apply and help shape the future of consumer risk at Intuit.
...
- Develop and implement innovative AI models and strategies to effectively manage credit risk for Intuit's consumer base.
...
- Collaborate with cross-functional teams to integrate AI solutions into existing risk management processes.
...
- Stay up-to-date with industry trends and advancements in AI and apply them to improve Intuit's credit risk management strategies.
...
- Lead and mentor junior team members in the development and implementation of AI models and strategies.
...
- Monitor and evaluate the performance of AI models, and make recommendations for improvements as needed.
...
- Act as a subject matter expert on AI and credit risk management, providing guidance and support to other teams within the organization.
...
- Collaborate with external partners
...
external data sources
...
credit risk management strategies.
...
- Identify and address potential ethical and bias issues in AI models, and take steps to mitigate any negative impact.
...
- Drive business impact through the development and implementation of innovative AI solutions for credit risk management.

results.title: Senior Data Scientist, Platform (Integrity) (Remote) | Wfh
highlights:
Senior Data Scientist, Platform (Integrity) (Remote) | Wfh
...
# Senior Data Scientist, Platform (Integrity) (Remote)
...
Senior Data Scientist, Platform (Integrity)
...
Department: Data Science
...
Trust is the foundation of a vibrant Airbnb community. The Content Integrity Data Science team helps build and protect that trust by ensuring that the content on Airbnb, including listings, profiles, messages and other user-generated experiences, is accurate, authentic and aligned with our policies and community standards.
...
We partner closely with product, engineering, policy and operations teams to develop advanced AI-driven content understanding systems, scale effective human-in-the-loop workflows and proactively defend against emerging content risks, so guests and hosts can interact with confidence.
...
This role is unique in that it directly improves the safety, trust, and quality of real-world user experiences by advancing Airbnb’s ability to understand, interpret and act on content at scale. You will help shape how the platform reasons about listings, profiles, messages and other user-generated content by building the next generation of Trust Content Understanding Models.
...
- The ideal candidate is a motivated and talented “full-stack” Data Scientist with strong applied ML intuition and a bias toward impact, who can own and drive forward challenging, high-visibility initiatives such as:
...
- Advance Airbnb’s content integrity capabilities by building Natural Language Processing (NLP) and LLM-based models that understand intent, policy compliance, quality and risk across listings, profiles, and user communications
...
- Develop high-performing models for detecting problematic or misleading content, including text classification, semantic similarity, information extraction and generative model-based reasoning for policy interpretation and enforcement
...
- Design and optimize human-in-the-loop Machine Learning (ML) systems for content review, labeling, escalation and continuous model improvement
...
- Build systems to detect emerging content risks and abuse patterns across regions, cohorts and surfaces using statistical, ML and representation-learning approaches
...
- Design intelligent sampling and evaluation strategies to measure rare events, policy recall, false positives/negatives and model blind spots in large-scale content systems
...
- Artificial Intelligence / Machine Learning: Build and deploy production AI/ML systems for content integrity and trust content understanding, including feature engineering, model development and evaluation, thresholding, error analysis and end-to-end model lifecycle management. This includes working with NLP and LLM-based models in real production settings.
...
- Your Expertise:
...
- 5+ years of industry experience in a quantitative analysis role with a Master’s degree in a quantitative field (computer science, statistics etc.), or 2+ years of experience with a Ph.D.
...
- State-of-the-art knowledge of AI/ML models
- Hands-on experience building, evaluating, and deploying NLP and LLM-based solutions, including text classification, information extraction, semantic understanding or generative applications.
...
- Working knowledge of causal inference
...
This position is US - Remote Eligible. The role may include occasional work at an Airbnb office or attendance at offsites, as agreed to with your manager. While the position is Remote Eligible, you must live in a state where Airbnb, Inc. has a registered entity. Click here for the up-to-date list of excluded states. This list is continuously evolving, so please check back with us if the state you live in is on the exclusion list. If your position is employed by another Airbnb entity, your recruiter will inform you what states you are eligible to work from.

results.title: iOS Software Developer 1- Dynamic Experiences | Joblume
highlights:
# iOS Software Developer 1- Dynamic Experiences
...
Intuit is seeking a highly motivated and experienced iOS Software Developer 1 to join the Dynamic Experiences Front-end team. This role is integral to their AI-Native future, focusing on delivering high-quality mobile UI platforms and leveraging AI coding assistants to enhance development efficiency. Responsibilities Successful delivery of high quality mobile UI platforms Extensively leverage AI coding assistants and modern tooling to write, test, and deploy code faster and more efficiently than traditional methods Partner effectively with all team members to deliver against commitments Work cross-functionally with various Intuit teams to drive forward results Commitment to team success and positive team dynamics Passion for growing and applying technical skills in service to customers Experience with Agile Development, SCRUM, and/or Kanban Programming methodologies Skills Bachelor's or Master's degree in Computer Science, a related technical field, or equivalent practical experience Foundational understanding of Agile development, mobile software engineering, Software Development Life Cycle (SDLC), and programming principles Coursework, internships, personal projects, or academic experience with mobile programming languages (e.g., SWIFT) An understanding and preferable experience with web services (REST or SOAP) Strong written, verbal, and collaboration skills with the ability to work effectively in a team environment Hands-on experience using AI coding tools (e.g., Claude Code, Cursor, Codex) to augment and accelerate your daily development workflows Willingness to learn and adapt to new priorities, tools, and technologies in a fast-paced, dynamic environment Benefits Cash bonus Equity rewards Benefits Company Overview Intuit provides financial software solutions to empower individuals and businesses. It was founded in 1983, and is headquartered in Mountain View, California, USA, with a workforce of 10001+ employees. Its website is https://www.intuit.com.

results.title: Yogesh Vaidya
highlights:
Senior ML/AI Engineer at Intuit · LLM Fine-Tuning · Agentic AI · End-to-End ML Systems
...
Senior Machine Learning Artificial intelligence Engineer at [Intuit](https://www.linkedin.com/company/intuit)
...
Senior ML/AI Engineer at Intuit with 6+ years of experience designing and deploying production-grade machine learning systems, agentic AI pipelines, and large-scale data infrastructure. I specialise in transforming complex, real-world datasets into reliable, end-to-end ML workflows with a strong focus on data integrity, reproducibility, and system reliability. At Turing, I engineered SFT training trajectories for LLM fine-tuning using vision-based CUA agents, architected distributed PySpark pipelines on Databricks Lakehouse processing 10TB+ data, and built agentic evaluation frameworks for META that reduced manual review effort by ~40% — covering everything from leakage-free train/test splits to deterministic grading systems. I have deep hands-on experience with cloud platforms (AWS S3, Azure Data Lake, GCP), MLOps principles, and lakehouse architectures, and I work across the full stack of modern AI — from prompt engineering and LLM workflows to scalable pipeline design and model validation. I approach machine learning as a systems problem: balancing data, infrastructure, evaluation, and performance to build AI that is robust, reproducible, and genuinely production-ready.
...
### Senior Machine Learning Artificial intelligence Engineer at [Intuit](https://www.linkedin.com/company/intuit) (Current)
...
Senior ML/AI Engineer with 6+ years of experience designing and deploying end-to-end machine learning systems across fintech, agentic AI, and large-scale data platforms. Currently at Intuit, I build production-grade ML and AI solutions that drive real business impact. My recent work at Turing spans LLM fine-tuning through SFT trajectory collection using vision-based CUA agents, distributed ML benchmarking on Databricks Lakehouse processing 10TB+ data, and building agentic evaluation frameworks that reduced manual review effort by ~40% — all the way from raw data pipelines to model validation and deployment. I'm deeply hands-on with PyTorch, HuggingFace, PySpark, MLflow, and cloud infrastructure on AWS, Azure, and GCP, and I thrive at the intersection of research-grade AI and real-world engineering.
...
As a Senior Machine Learning Engineer at Turing, I specialize in designing and deploying scalable AI and data-driven solutions that transform complex challenges into intelligent systems. My expertise spans machine learning, generative AI, and cloud-based model optimization, with a focus on delivering real-world business impact. I’m a Certified Oracle Cloud Infrastructure Generative AI Professional, skilled in leveraging cloud technologies to build efficient, secure, and high-performing AI pipelines. Passionate about innovation, I enjoy working at the intersection of ML research, cloud infrastructure, and product development, continuously exploring ways to make AI more accessible and effective.
...
I’m a Senior Data Scientist and Machine Learning Engineer with 6 years of experience building data-driven, AI-powered solutions that deliver real business impact. At Kalapuri, I developed predictive and NLP models that boosted revenue by 5%, improved conversions by 12%, and reduced reporting time by 70%. Skilled in Python, TensorFlow, PyTorch, XGBoost, Azure, and Snowflake, I specialize in creating scalable ML systems, LLM-based recommendation engines, and intelligent automation workflows. Passionate about applying AI and generative models to solve real-world challenges and drive innovation.

Today, I took a moment to reflect on a small but significant milestone in my journey as an AI engineer. Over the past weeks, I focused on stabilizing a production-grade conversational analytics agent, tracing long-running failures, uncovering hidden verification loops, and redesigning the system with bounded execution, observability, and reliability at its core. What initially appeared to be a simple latency issue transformed into a powerful reminder: real AI engineering is not solely about building models, but about creating intelligent systems that are trustworthy, predictable, and usable in the real world.
...

AI Data Scientist at [Intuit](https://www.linkedin.com/company/intuit)

AI/Data Scientist specializing in Generative AI, LLM systems, and autonomous agents, with 3+ years of experience building and deploying production-grade machine learning solutions in financial and enterprise environments. At Intuit, I design and develop end-to-end GenAI systems that power intelligent financial workflows across platforms like QuickBooks and TurboTax. My work focuses on building scalable LLM-driven applications—from retrieval-augmented generation (RAG) pipelines and LLM evaluation frameworks to real-time AI agents that automate complex financial tasks such as expense categorization, invoice processing, and bookkeeping. I have hands-on experience fine-tuning large language models on domain-specific data (tax codes, accounting rules) and implementing robust evaluation pipelines using LLM-as-a-Judge, benchmarking, and adversarial testing to improve accuracy, reliability, and compliance in production systems. My expertise spans: • LLM Systems & Generative AI (RAG, Prompt Engineering, Fine-Tuning) • Autonomous AI Agents (LangChain, LangGraph) • MLOps & Deployment (Docker, AWS/Azure, Model Monitoring) • Data Engineering (Python, SQL, ETL, PySpark) • Applied ML (classification, clustering, predictive modeling) Previously at Mphasis, I worked on machine learning solutions across BFSI and retail domains, building data pipelines, developing predictive models, and delivering business insights through analytics and visualization. results.title: Senior Data Scientist, Platform | Wfhforgeon
highlights:
Senior Data Scientist, Platform | Wfhforgeon
...
# Senior Data Scientist, Platform
...
Posted Jun 23, 2026
...
Trust is the foundation of a vibrant Airbnb community. The Content Integrity Data Science team helps build and protect that trust by ensuring that the content on Airbnb, including listings, profiles, messages and other user-generated experiences, is accurate, authentic and aligned with our policies and community standards.
...
We partner closely with product, engineering, policy and operations teams to develop advanced AI-driven content understanding systems, scale effective human-in-the-loop workflows and proactively defend against emerging content risks, so guests and hosts can interact with confidence.
...
This role is unique in that it directly improves the safety, trust, and quality of real-world user experiences by advancing Airbnb’s ability to understand, interpret and act on content at scale. You will help shape how the platform reasons about listings, profiles, messages and other user-generated content by building the next generation of Trust Content Understanding Models.
...
- The ideal candidate is a motivated and talented “full-stack” Data Scientist with strong applied ML intuition and a bias toward impact, who can own and drive forward challenging, high-visibility initiatives such as:
...
- Advance Airbnb’s content integrity capabilities by building Natural Language Processing (NLP) and LLM-based models that understand intent, policy compliance, quality and risk across listings, profiles, and user communications
...
- Develop high-performing models for detecting problematic or misleading content, including text classification, semantic similarity, information extraction and generative model-based reasoning for policy interpretation and enforcement
...
- Design and optimize human-in-the-loop Machine Learning (ML) systems for content review, labeling, escalation and continuous model improvement
...
- Build systems to detect emerging content risks and abuse patterns across regions, cohorts and surfaces using statistical, ML and representation-learning approaches
...
- Design intelligent sampling and evaluation strategies to measure rare events, policy recall, false positives/negatives and model blind spots in large-scale content systems
...
- A Typical Day:
...
- Artificial Intelligence / Machine Learning: Build and deploy production AI/ML systems for content integrity and trust content understanding, including feature engineering, model development and evaluation, thresholding, error analysis and end-to-end model lifecycle management. This includes working with NLP and LLM-based models in real production settings.
...
- Inference: Partner with inference data scientists to conduct rigorous quantitative analyses, applying working knowledge of causal inference to interpret results, assess impact, and identify gaps and opportunities to improve content quality and trust outcomes.
...
strategically about how
...
scale and evolve Airbnb
...
s content integrity defenses
...
- Your Expertise:
...
- 5+ years of industry experience in a quantitative analysis role with a Master’s degree in a quantitative field (computer science, statistics etc.), or 2+ years of experience with a Ph.D.
- State-of-the-art knowledge of AI/ML models
- Hands-on experience building, evaluating, and deploying NLP and LLM-based solutions, including text classification, information extraction, semantic understanding or generative applications.
...
- Working knowledge of causal inference
...
- Skilled in statistical programming (Python or R) and database usage (SQL)

results.title: Rakul Venkatesan
highlights:
Senior AI Security Engineer @Intuit | AI Cybersecurity | Specialization in Fraud & Security Systems | LLM & RAG Specialist | Agentic AI Developer
...
Senior AI Engineer - Fraud & Security at [Intuit](https://www.linkedin.com/company/intuit)
...
I am an AI/ML Engineer with 5+ years of experience designing, deploying, and scaling production-grade Generative AI, Retrieval-Augmented Generation (RAG), and agentic AI systems across enterprise and fintech environments. Currently working as an AI Engineer at Fannie Mae, I specialize in building cloud-native, data-centric AI solutions that drive intelligent automation, risk analysis, and decision support at scale. My expertise lies in developing distributed training and inference pipelines, fine-tuning domain-specific LLMs using LoRA/QLoRA, and architecting high-performance RAG systems grounded in structured and unstructured data. I have hands-on experience delivering explainable, governed, and low-latency AI systems on AWS and GCP, ensuring reliability, compliance, and business impact. Previously at Intuit and GrayRadiant Data Services, I built large-scale ML platforms for fraud detection, personalization, forecasting, and customer analytics, supporting millions of users. My work consistently focuses on improving model accuracy, reducing operational risk, and enabling data-driven decision-making. What I Bring to the Table ✔ Generative AI, LLMs, RAG & Agentic AI Systems ✔ Distributed Training, Model Optimization & GPU Acceleration ✔ Cloud ML Architecture (AWS, GCP, Kubernetes, MLOps) ✔ Data-Centric AI, Feature Engineering & Drift Monitoring ✔ Production ML, Observability & Lifecycle Management ✔ NLP, Transformers & Multimodal AI Systems Key Achievements - Reduced underwriting turnaround by 30% through agent-driven GenAI workflow - Lowered hallucinations by 50%+ using grounded RAG architectures - Cut LLM fine-tuning costs by 60% via efficient PEFT techniques - Improved model reliability by 40% with advanced monitoring systems - Delivered scalable AI platforms handling 10K+ daily queries With a strong foundation in Data Science and multiple industry certifications, I am passionate about building responsible, scalable, and high-impact AI systems that bridge cutting-edge research with real- world applications. I’m always open to collaborating on innovative AI initiatives, enterprise GenAI platforms, and next-generation intelligent systems. Let’s connect and build the future of AI together.
...
### Senior AI Engineer - Fraud & Security at [Intuit](https://www.linkedin.com/company/intuit) (Current)
...
### Machine Learning Engineer at [Intuit](https://www.linkedin.com/company/intuit)
...
- Designed and deployed production-grade ML systems on AWS for payments and fintech platforms, delivering real-time risk scoring, user behavior forecasting, and personalization using Python, SQL, XGBoost, LightGBM, and scalable cloud-native pipelines.
...
- Architected end-to-end ML platforms (S3, EMR, EC2, Lambda, RDS, CloudWatch) supporting large-scale feature engineering, distributed model training, evaluation, and low-latency inference for high-traffic financial applications.
...
- Built causal inference and experimentation frameworks (propensity scoring, uplift modeling, synthetic control, regression discontinuity) to drive statistically sound product, pricing, and growth decisions beyond standard A/B testing.
...
- Developed batch and streaming ML workflows for fraud detection, revenue optimization, churn prediction, LTV modeling, and customer segmentation, integrating models into production services through robust MLOps pipelines.
...
Applied NLP and advanced analytics on customer feedback and behavioral data to generate actionable insights, powering executive dashboards and data-driven strategy for retention, monetization, and long-term business growth.
...

...
Senior Engineering Manager-Data at [Intuit](https://www.linkedin.com/company/
...
I'm a Senior Engineering Manager with 15+ years of experience leading Big Data, AI/ML, and GenAI platform engineering teams — and a track record of shipping products that move the needle for millions of customers. At Intuit, I lead a team of 18 engineers delivering data infrastructure and AI-powered products across TurboTax, QuickBooks, Credit Karma, and MailChimp. My team owns DataMarts for multiple domains including Intuit Signal (Voice of Customer), Digital Help & GenAI, Expert Tracking (IEP), Smart Expert Recommendations, and Speech & Text Analytics. I spent years as a hands-on Big Data and platform engineer before moving into leadership — that technical depth means I can set clear architectural direction, make fast decisions in ambiguous situations, and earn trust with senior engineers. Recognized by VP and SVP leadership at Intuit for "charting a new course for how data is used to impact customers and the business." Certified Hadoop Developer (CCD-410). Stack: Spark, PySpark, Kafka, AWS, Python, LLMs, GenAI orchestration. Open to Senior Engineering Manager, Director of Engineering, and Director/VP of Data & AI conversations. 📬 rahulvishnoi78@gmail.com
...
Lead 18 engineers (13 FTE + contractors) across multiple product domains, delivering analytics infrastructure and AI-powered data products across TurboTax, QuickBooks, Credit Karma, MailChimp, and the Virtual Expert Platform. Intuit Signal — Unified Voice of Customer: Scaled platform as the unified VoC source of truth across CG, GBSG, TTLC, Credit Karma, and Social — projected 40%+ team efficiency gain and 10%+ PRS lift. Built GenAI Insight Batch Orchestrator: 600% improvement in Service Score quality for GBSG; cut 60-hour process to ~5 hours. Digital Help — Intuit Assist & GenAI: Led team to deliver unified AI Adoption pipeline replacing fragmented analyst-owned processes; powers Listen4U, Chat4U, QnA, and Intuit Assist analytics.  Expert Tracking (IEP): Led data engineering for largest IEP evolution to date — scaled to 4000+ experts. Delivered Supervisor v2 data mart: 8,500+ daily active experts, 89.1% first-try success across 70,000+ daily events, <1.38% failure rate. Smart Expert Recommendations (SER): Built unified Serve2Sell attribution framework — MSE orders, desktop conversions, SKU-level data mapped from recommendation to sale. Established international G&R reporting for Canada and UK SER markets for the first time. Restored metric trust by resolving lead-pass and recommendation-rate data discrepancies in G&R leadership dashboards. Operational Excellence & AI: Achieved 100% team adoption of AI tools (AI PR Review Agent, AI Code Assist) → 3x velocity shift. Built and structured team of 18 across 5 domains; structured onboarding with AI tools (Cursor, MCPs, Windsurf). Retired 176 redundant pipelines → ~$264K annual savings; standardized 81% of ICS core metrics. Recognition: Recognized by SVP and VP leadership directly for transformational impact. Named in CK VEP Digital Assistant cross-functional launch recognition (100+ contributors, 8+ orgs, 12+ months).

results.title: Intuit Machine Learning Engineer Interview Questions 2026
highlights:
Intuit Machine Learning Engineer Interview
...
Intuit Machine Learning Engineer Interview Questions 2026
...
Intuit Machine Learning Engineer interview
...
### What is a Machine Learning Engineer at Intuit?
...
As a **Machine Learning Engineer** at **Intuit**, you sit at the intersection of complex financial data and cutting-edge artificial intelligence. Your work is fundamental to powering **Intuit’s** mission of "powering prosperity" by building intelligent features that help millions of customers manage their taxes, personal finances, and small business operations. You are not just building models; you are engineering the robust, scalable pipelines that bring these models into production to solve real-world financial problems.
...
The role demands a balance of academic rigor in machine learning and the pragmatic software engineering discipline required to maintain systems that serve millions of users. Whether you are working on classification models for fraud detection, predictive features for financial forecasting, or optimizing search and recommendation engines, your impact is measured by the tangible benefit to the customer. You will collaborate closely with **AI Scientists**, **Product Managers**, and **Product Engineers**, acting as the bridge that turns a theoretical data science prototype into a high-performance, production-ready experience.
...
Intuit places a heavy emphasis on the "craft" of machine learning. You will be expected to demonstrate not just your ability to build a model, but your ability to evaluate it, monitor it, and maintain it in a live production environment.
...
**Role-Related Knowledge** – You must demonstrate deep fluency in Python and standard data science libraries (Scikit-Learn, Pandas, Spark). Interviewers are looking for candidates who understand the "why" behind an algorithm, not just the "how" of its implementation.
...
As a **Machine Learning Engineer** at **Intuit**, your daily work involves translating business problems into technical solutions. You will spend significant time cleaning and preparing data, as high-quality features are the bedrock of **Intuit’s** AI initiatives. You will work closely with **AI Scientists** to refine models, often iterating on codebases to improve prediction accuracy or reduce training time.
...
Beyond the modeling phase, you are responsible for the infrastructure that keeps models running. This involves building and maintaining CI/CD pipelines for machine learning, running A/B tests to measure model impact, and ensuring that all production systems are properly monitored. You will frequently interact with product teams to ensure that your technical output is directly contributing to customer benefits and product KPIs.
...
* **Must-have skills**: Proficiency in Python and SQL, strong knowledge of machine learning techniques (classification, regression, clustering), and experience with data processing frameworks like Spark.
...
* **Software engineering fundamentals
...
in version control
...
production-ready code
...
an understanding of data
...
algorithmic complexity.
...
* **Nice-to-have skills**: Experience with cloud platforms (AWS or
...
), familiarity with containerization (Docker/Kubernetes), and a strong track record of deploying models that support millions of users.
...
The **Machine Learning Engineer** role at **Intuit** offers a unique opportunity to apply sophisticated technology to real-world financial challenges at an massive scale. Success in this process comes down to your ability to combine technical expertise with a product-focused mindset, demonstrating that you can build models that are not just accurate, but also robust and valuable to the end user.
